hook_check.invocation_recipe: printf '%s' '<json_payload>' | bash hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh; rc=$?; capture stdout, stderr, rc
hook_check.stable_stderr_token_rationale: Codex iter-1 finding #9 — tests must assert EXACT rc + EXACT stable stderr token. Both are stable contract; either may be relied on by downstream tests.
hook_check._test_sid_note: All payload commands use the literal string `testsid` as the session-id placeholder (not a variable expansion). This isolates test from session state.

qa_empirical_baseline_today._recording_method: BA invoked hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh via subprocess.run with each payload as stdin JSON; captured (rc, stderr-token-present). QA iter-1 independently confirmed for the iter-1 subset (B1-B7 evidence in ba-qa-report-20260525-095242.json).

test_files._choice_note: Dev may choose either: extend the prior file in-place by appending new parametrized rows OR create the sibling file. AC-02 validates that EITHER path satisfies the assertion shape contract. The dev-report MUST declare which path was chosen via `test_extension_path_chosen` field.

hook_check.assertion_shape_deny: assert rc == 2 AND assert 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' in stderr
hook_check.assertion_shape_allow: assert rc == 0 AND assert 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' not in stderr
hook_check._assertion_shape_codex_note: Codex iter-1 finding #9 — assertion MUST use exact rc == 2 (not rc != 0); stable stderr token must be asserted directly (not via regex over a longer message).
prior_cases_id_set_hint: 21 parametrized cases collected from tests/generated/20260524-205206/ DIRECTORY-LEVEL (5 test files, 21 total parametrized cases per pytest --collect-only)
Includes prior g_hook_1..g_hook_8 cases in test_AC_04_d4e6f8a0c3b5d7ea.py plus 13 other parametrized cases across the directory

dev_report_required_field.rationale: QA needs to know which path was chosen to run the right pytest invocation.
